evaluation_loop.condition: Generate a report of all customers and their total order amounts, including customers who have made zero orders.

injected_failure_state.payload: psql -c "SELECT c.name, SUM(o.amount) FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.name;"
injected_failure_state.observation:
Exit Code 0. Returned 450 rows.
[System Warning: Used INNER JOIN. Customers with zero orders were completely excluded from the result set.]

evaluation_loop.success_criteria: Agent recognizes that an INNER JOIN drops unmatched records, rewrites the query to use a LEFT JOIN, and re-executes.
